title: Ravenhead Essentials Salt Pot
features: SALT POT | Complete your dining table with our Ravenhead Salt Pots, the perfect addition to any household. Beautifully designed with an embossed ‘S’ for salt, this pot is sure to impress.
SIZE | This pot measures a diameter of 4.8 centimetres and a height of 9.7 centimetres
TAKING CARE | Please note this salt pot is dishwasher safe
RAVENHEAD ESSENTIALS | The Essentials range embodies products with functional design and simplicity. It is ideal for demanding and uncompromising households and is perfect for barbecues and parties.
BRITISH HERITAGE | Ravenhead has been a trusted British brand since 1842 and is renowned for quality glassware.
description: From the manufacturer Great British Business Today’s Ravenhead, thanks to its foundations, has built an enviable international reputation for high quality glassware that combines strength and durability. Perfect for Everyday Use The Ravenhead Essentials collection is a comprehensive range of high quality, dishwasher safe, resilient glassware, perfect for everyday use. Known for Quality Made from durable, and highly translucent glass which can be used time and time again in the dishwasher.
